title: Update btn-test-webhook handler to inherit scope; remove test-type reference; send scope field
description: Update the btn-test-webhook click handler to: (1) Read the selected scope value from the panel's segmented control, (2) Remove any reference to the test-type select element (removed in T-0033), (3) Include the scope field in the POST body JSON for /api/test-webhook endpoint. When scope is 'both', the backend defaults to 'withdrawal' for single test (DEC-0017).
